title: hieracium porrectum subsp. subelongatum
intro: Hieracium porrectum subsp. subelongatum, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and combating bacterial infections due to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and promote healing in cases of burns, cuts, and other skin irritations. Hawkweed can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
